name: Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds shrimp, cooked, shelled, and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced garlic and chopped parsley to the skillet.
3. Pour in the dry sherry and stir to combine.
4. Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer gently.
5. Add the cooked shrimp to the skillet and continue cooking until heated through, about 7 to 8 minutes.
6. Turn off the heat when the shrimp are heated through.
